steps.instruction: Remove the sample from the alcohol in which it was preserved and place it in a Petridish under the stereoscope.
Place the cephalothorax and legs (called from now on “the sample”) on a piece ofpaper towel to remove as much alcohol as possible from the sample.
Remove the sample’s abdomen and discard it, leaving only the cephalothorax and legs.
Leave the sample at room temperature for 5 minutes to allow any remaining alcohol toevaporate.
Transfer the sample to a pre-chilled (with liquid nitrogen for 15 seconds) 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube.
Add approximately 1 mL Liquid nitrogen Contributed by users to freeze the sample completely.
Ground the sample into small pieces (< 1 mm) or a fine powder using a plastic pestle.

Add 500 µL CTAB buffer ( 2 % volume CTAB: 100 millimolar (mM) 1.4 Molarity (M) Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234 , 20 millimolar (mM) EDTA disodium dihydrate Abblis Catalog #AB1011793 , 2 Mass / % volume CTAB Contributed by users , 2 % (v/v) Polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP-40) Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #PB0436.SIZE.250g )
Add 20 µL of Proteinase K (20 mg/ml) Contributed by users
Incubate Overnight at 55 °C with continuous shaking at 800 rpm.
1. Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Transfer 400 µL of the supernatant to a 2 mL tube.
Add 400 µL of Chlorofom-octanol (24:1) Contributed by users
Repeat steps 22-25 at least once again.
Discard all the ethanol by decantation ensuring not to disturb the pellet (important: remove alcohol as much as you can).
Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Mix by vortex for 00:00:05 .
Add 500 µL 70% Ethanol Contributed by users .
Discard all the supernatant ensuring not to disturb the pellet (important: remove supernatant as much as you can).
Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Place the samples on ice and refrigerate at -20 °C for 01:00:00 (or overnight).
Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00 .
Add 300 µL of Isopropanol Contributed by users at -20 °C .
Transfer 300 µL of the supernatant (without disturbing the organic phase) to a 1.5 mL tube.
Centrifuge samples 14000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes
Mix by inverting the tubes for 00:02:00
Leave the tubes upside down on a napkin to remove excess ethanol for 02:00:00
Once the pellet was completely dry, it was eluted in 50 µL of TE Buffer Contributed by users .
